name: BB84
summary: Alice encodes random bits in nonorthogonal bases and Bob measures in randomly chosen bases; mismatched bases are discarded.

name: Decoy-state BB84
summary: A weak-coherent-pulse QKD method using signal and decoy intensities to estimate single-photon contributions and reduce photon-number-splitting risk.

name: E91
summary: An entanglement-based protocol using correlations and Bell inequality tests to detect eavesdropping under idealized assumptions.

name: BBM92
summary: An entanglement-based protocol closely related to BB84 where correlated measurement outcomes are used for key generation.

name: MDI-QKD
summary: A protocol family designed to remove detector side channels by using an untrusted measurement station.

name: Twin-field QKD
summary: A protocol family using single-photon interference at a middle station to improve long-distance scaling under suitable assumptions.

name: CV-QKD
summary: A QKD family using quadrature modulation and coherent or homodyne/heterodyne measurements instead of discrete photon encoding.

name: Quantum teleportation
summary: Transfers an unknown quantum state using shared entanglement and classical communication.

name: Entanglement swapping
summary: Creates entanglement between distant nodes by performing Bell-state measurements on intermediate entangled pairs.
